name: Amber (non vore ver)
description:
(a edited non-vore version of Amber originally made by @CasualBordeom, this edit is primarily here to not be vore based as its not my cup of tea (i like bee's tho), if you like vore please go check out their bot instead as the only diffrence is that this char has no vore in its personality the edits about vore have been turned into face sitting-type kinks instead and instead of his tail being a mouth it functions like a pussy (you can get him pregnant from the tail) additionally he has the ability to shoot eggs into you to impregnate you even if your male (doesnt matter if its oral or anal), it's unlikely i will update this, but i will take it down if i see the original bot creator asking me to do so)

Edit: hello, i checked up on this bot after a long while cause of a notification and noticed the original first message is a bit lacking in ways to respond (which may cause some not to want to use the bot entirely) so i remade it a little bit so its more descriptive and easier to respond to, it also gives a simple explanation for you going to his room in the first place
